data.title: Bitget has launched U-based FHE perpetual contracts with leverage ranging from 1 to 20 times
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Bitget announced that it has launched U-based FHE perpetual contracts with a leverage range of 1-20 times. Contract trading BOT will be opened simultaneously.

data.title: LBank launches bang (BANG) for the first time
data.description: LBank officially announced that it has launched bang (BANG) for the first time at 10:55 (SGT) on April 12, and opened the BANG/USDT trading pair. Currently, the deposit service is open, and the withdrawal service will be open at 11:00 on April 13.

data.title: SEC and Binance Agree to Extend Litigation Hold
data.description:
SEC and Binance propose 60-day litigation pause, impacting crypto regulations.
source: https://coincu.com/331683-sec-binance-litigation-60-day-pause

data.title: Movement: Cornucopia snapshot will be taken tonight, rewards will be distributed and withdrawals will be available next week
data.description: The Movement Foundation has officially announced that it will take a snapshot of Cornucopia tonight. The first phase of Cornucopia is coming to an end, and rewards and asset withdrawals will be carried out next week. The second phase of Cornucopia will start next Wednesday, and in addition to Cornucopia assets, it will also incentivize pools such as MOVE/USDC, MOVE/USDT, MOVE/WETH, and MOVE/WBTC.

data.title: Wayfinder (PROMPT) short-term breakthrough 0.48 USDT, 24H increase of 163.14%
data.description: OKX market data shows that Wayfinder (PROMPT) rose to 0.48613 USDT in the short term, setting a new historical high and a 24-hour increase of 163.14%.

data.title: Top Trader Predicts Market Stagnation Without Major Interventions
data.description: According to BlockBeats, top trader Eugene Ng Ah Sio shared insights on his personal channel, revealing that he initiated small short positions on ETH, SOL, and XRP when Bitcoin reached $83,500 last night. He expressed skepticism about the market's ability to sustain momentum unless there is direct intervention from the Federal Reserve or a significant easing of U.S.-China tariffs.

data.title: Binance will adjust the portfolio margin collateral ratio
data.description: According to the official announcement, Binance will adjust the collateral ratio of DENT, ENJ, NOT, DASH, CHZ, AXS, ENS, SAND, THETA, QNT and other assets under the portfolio margin model at 06:00 (UTC) on April 18, 2025. The adjustment will be completed in about 1 hour. (This newsletter is generated by AI)

data.title: After Winklevoss Capital transferred 3,750 ETH to Galaxy Digital, the latter transferred 12,500 ETH to Binance
data.description: The Data Nerd's monitoring shows that 14 hours ago, Winklevoss Capital transferred about 3,750 ETH (about 5.84 million US dollars) to Galaxy Digital; 5 hours later, Galaxy Digital recharged 12,500 ETH (about 19.74 million US dollars) to Binance.

data.title: Trader Eugene: I have already shorted ETH, SOL, and XRP when BTC reached 83,500, and I don’t think the market is sustainable
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Well-known trader Eugene said in the Telegram channel: "When Bitcoin hit $83,500 at night, I established a small number of ETH, SOL and XRP short positions. Unless the Federal Reserve intervenes explicitly or the Chinese tariff issue is properly eased, I don't think the market will have much sustainability."

data.title: Spanish police bust $21 million cryptocurrency scam
data.description: Spanish police have arrested six people in a two-year operation, dismantling a cryptocurrency investment fraud ring that used artificial intelligence to defraud 208 people of more than 19 million euros ($21.5 million). Authorities said the suspects used realistic celebrity videos created with AI technology to promise huge returns through crypto investments. The suspects have been charged with fraud, money laundering and false documents, and the investigation is ongoing. (Decrypt)
